task_completion.description: Navigate to the Wazuh Agents inventory or management screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wazuh dashboard is visible, specifically showing the 'Agents' list or inventory page.

task_completion.description: Filter or search for the stale agents matching the 'temp-test-' pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar or filter criteria contains 'temp-test-' and the agent list displays the matching ephemeral agents.

task_completion.description: Select the stale agents and initiate the deletion process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes next to the 'temp-test-' agents are selected, and a 'Delete' or 'Remove' action is being triggered.

task_completion.description: Confirm the deletion of the selected stale agents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation dialog for deleting the agents is visible, or a success notification/toast indicating the agents have been removed.

task_completion.description: Ensure only the manager and production agents remain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final agent inventory list shows exactly 3 agents ('production-web', 'production-db', and the manager/agent 000). No 'temp-test-' agents are visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the Wazuh web GUI to perform the cleanup.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Wazuh web interface in a browser, rather than just executing terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Wazuh application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Wazuh dashboard (Kibana/OpenSearch) and is not a text editor or static mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open in the screenshots showing the final agent count.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The environment starts with exactly 28 agents: 1 manager (ID 000), 2 production agents ('production-web' and 'production-db'), and 25 stale agents named 'temp-test-01' through 'temp-test-25'. The correct final state must show exactly 3 agents remaining in the inventory.
